Best PG in Ahmedabad

What you need to know before choosing a PG.

Ahmedabad has become a popular city for students and working professionals. Finding a PG is easy, but finding a good one needs a closer look at real daily comfort, not just photos or rent.

Final thought

A good PG should make your life simpler. If you constantly deal with food, cleaning, or security problems, it is not worth it, no matter how cheap or fancy it looks.

Why Galactic Living is different

Most PGs just give you a room and leave the rest to you. Galactic Living makes the whole experience easier, cleaner, safer, and more structured than typical inconsistent PG setups.

24/7 security with CCTV and controlled access
Clean spaces with regular housekeeping
Daily meals that are simple and consistent
Reliable Wi-Fi for work or study
Common areas to relax or hang out

What to check before choosing

What is included in the cost: food, Wi-Fi, cleaning
Furniture, ventilation, and everyday comfort
Food quality and hygiene
Security measures
Distance from college or workplace

What you typically get

Furnished rooms with AC and attached washrooms
Meals and clean drinking water
Wi-Fi and power backup
Housekeeping and laundry
Security systems
Lounges and activity areas

Resident voices

Move-in stories with less drama.

“The move-in felt like a boutique hotel. Clean rooms, quick support, and the food is genuinely dependable.”

Aarav Mehta

Design student

“I wanted safety without compromising on style. Galactic Living feels polished, calm, and very well managed.”

Riya Shah

Product analyst

“WiFi, laundry, meals, visits, payments: everything is organized. It made relocating to Ahmedabad frictionless.”

Dev Patel

Engineering intern

FAQ

Quick answers before you visit.

Can I schedule a same-day visit?

Yes. Use Book Visit or WhatsApp and our team will confirm the fastest available slot.

Are meals included?

Most plans include breakfast and dinner, with upgrades available per property.

Is there a security deposit?

Yes, deposits vary by room type and are shown before booking confirmation.

Can I choose occupancy?

Single, double, triple, and quad options are available depending on property inventory.

GALACTIC LIVING

Premium PG and hostel living designed for students, creators, and working professionals who want comfort without chaos.
